title: dalbergia multifoliolata
intro: Dalbergia multifoliolata, also known as the Makasar ebony, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dalbergia multifoliolata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
